canonical_question: How do I create a tone of voice guide — formal/casual, serious/playful, authoritative/approachable scales with examples?
aliases: Brand tone of voice template with scales and examples
How to define voice and tone guidelines for content
Tone dimensions framework — formal, casual, playful, serious scales
constraints: Voice stays constant across all content; tone adapts to context and user emotional state
Each tone dimension must include concrete do/don't examples — abstract scales without examples are unusable
Content type tone mapping must cover at minimum: marketing, product UI, error messages, support, and legal
The guide must be validated with real writing samples from your existing content before rollout
Tone guides without stakeholder sign-off get ignored — secure executive and cross-team buy-in before distributing

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User needs full brand strategy including positioning and visual identity
User only needs a content style guide (grammar, formatting, terminology)

depends_on.label: Brand positioning defines the voice foundation

related_to.label: Audit existing content against the completed guide

inputs_needed.question: Does the brand have existing voice/tone documentation?
options: formal guide exists but needs updating

inputs_needed.question: How much content does the team produce?
How many people create content for the brand?
What level of formality does the industry expect?
